_comment: NON-NORMATIVE / DRAFT fixture for Project B (klickd.app marketing video). Targets RFC-002 v1 (v4-A) + v2 draft (v4-B). Project B is consumer-facing in the EU (parents, students); gates skew stricter than Project A on identity, named-person, and medical/educational claims. No secrets. This file does NOT validate against any current schema.
_project: B — klickd.app learning app marketing video
_status: DRAFT — fixture prep only; no render authorised

gates.reason: Publishing a film about a children's learning product requires Vince's explicit approval — no one-click confirm.
No real child, no real teacher, no real parent appears. Synthetic silhouettes only.
Hosting / availability / 'made in Luxembourg' style claims must be grounded before they appear in a frame.
No voice cloning. No child or teacher voice may be sampled or mimicked, real or stylised.
Kai is a learning companion, not a clinician. Any frame that could be read as medical advice must stop.
Storyboard sketches and mood frames are creative play; do not interrupt.

records.summary: EU-hosting claim — to be re-checked against the live hosting contract before render.
'Made in Luxembourg' claim — to be re-checked against the public company registry before render.
Proof Mode is shown on screen — its public availability and naming must be confirmed before render.
Four language flags (en, fr, de, lb) — coverage and quality per language must be confirmed before render.

human_veto_policy.rationale: Children-facing brand work requires explicit human approval for anything published, any identity-shaped artefact, and any claim that could be read as medical.

params.claim: Proof Mode is a real, live feature

criteria: All factual_claim_with_date items have claim_status in ['executed', 'inspected']
No real child or teacher likeness appears in any media_profile entry
The only outbound URL in the closing card is https://klickd.app
All four language narrator slots, if used, have matching consent and synthetic producer

error_journal.summary: Test pack drafted before any render. No incident — entry seeds the journal so the children-facing posture is causally linked to the rule set.
error_journal.lesson: Project B renders must pass all contract tests AND demonstrate no real child/teacher likeness before public_post can be authorised.
